name: Human idea stage: restore the pre-sweep best surface and peel the hot-band K loop into steady-state

summary.name: Human idea stage: restore the pre-sweep best surface and peel the hot-band K loop into steady-state
summary.hypothesis: The reversed B sweep is a clear negative and should not be the surface for further work. The next human-idea direction is therefore to restore the pre-sweep best hot-band consumer order and then specialize the 452-tile hot-band K loop into prologue, steady-state, and epilogue so the common path no longer pays `future_tile_idx` / `next_tile_idx` branch logic every iteration. Because the hot-band kernel is already fully fixed-shape and uses `#pragma unroll 1`, this is the cleanest remaining control-side experiment on top of the best-known warp-local consumer path.
summary.expected_bottleneck: Fixed-shape control-flow and stage-transition overhead inside the hot-band K loop.
summary.risk: Moderate. The idea is mechanically straightforward, but the hot-band pipeline is delicate and the specialization must preserve the proven pre-sweep consumer order while removing only the generic loop branches.
summary.stop_condition: Reject if the restored + peeled loop does not beat the pre-sweep best surface or if barrier / hot-band time fail to improve.

notes: Node C may now implement this one direction.
